faq.a: Landing pages often take 2–4 weeks; larger products range from 6–12 weeks depending on scope and feedback cadence.
Yes — monthly retainers for dependency updates, monitoring, and small fixes.

faq.q: I already have Figma designs — does that reduce cost?
faq.a: Usually yes — the UI phase is shorter; pricing depends on file quality and component coverage.
Typically 30% kickoff, milestones along the way, and the remainder at handover.

ecommerce-analytics.title: E-commerce analytics dashboard
ecommerce-analytics.shortDescription: Real-time dashboard for shop owners to track orders and inventory.
ecommerce-analytics.description: A sales KPI dashboard with charts and low-stock alerts.
ecommerce-analytics.problem: Sales data lived in spreadsheets across multiple channels.
ecommerce-analytics.solution: Unified dashboard with lightweight ETL, interactive charts, and role-based access.
ecommerce-analytics.results: ~40% less daily reconciliation time; faster restocking decisions with automated alerts.

fitness-companion-app.title: Cross-platform fitness app
fitness-companion-app.shortDescription: Personalized workouts with progress tracking and push notifications.
fitness-companion-app.description: Flutter app with a Node.js backend, syncing training and nutrition plans.
fitness-companion-app.problem: Users wanted one app for schedules, reminders, and a small community.
fitness-companion-app.solution: Short onboarding, push notifications, and reliable cloud sync.
fitness-companion-app.results: Higher day-7 retention; strong feedback on UX and smooth performance.

saas-landing-rebrand.title: SaaS landing & brand refresh
saas-landing-rebrand.shortDescription: Landing redesign and design system for a B2B product.
saas-landing-rebrand.description: New UI/UX, Figma prototypes, and a Next.js build with subtle motion.
saas-landing-rebrand.problem: The site did not communicate product value and conversion was low.
saas-landing-rebrand.solution: Information architecture refresh, clearer hero, social proof, and consistent CTAs.
saas-landing-rebrand.results: More demo bookings within two weeks of launch; cohesive marketing brand.

booking-portal-web.title: Service booking portal
booking-portal-web.shortDescription: Booking website with payments and staff scheduling for SMEs.
booking-portal-web.description: Full-stack Next.js with payments and an admin panel.
booking-portal-web.problem: Bookings were handled by phone, causing conflicts and lost leads.
booking-portal-web.solution: Smart booking forms, online deposits, and staff-aware scheduling in admin.
booking-portal-web.results: Fewer phone inquiries; measurable growth in online bookings.

corporate-identity.title: Quantum Corporate Identity
corporate-identity.shortDescription: A cutting-edge landing experience for high-growth tech enterprises.
corporate-identity.description: We developed a full brand experience that emphasizes speed, security, and scalability. The site features real-time 3D elements and a sleek dark aesthetic.
corporate-identity.problem: High-tech companies often have complex services that are difficult to explain visually, leading to high bounce rates on traditional corporate sites.
corporate-identity.solution: We implemented a 'Quantum Design' language using Three.js backgrounds and interactive micro-interactions that guide users through technical concepts effortlessly.
corporate-identity.results: 45% increase in user session duration and a significant boost in lead quality from enterprise partners.

product-catalog.title: Omni-Channel Product Catalog
product-catalog.shortDescription: A seamless management and showcase platform for global inventories.
product-catalog.description: A centralized hub designed to handle tens of thousands of SKUs with sub-second search speeds and beautiful product visualizations.
product-catalog.problem: Clients with large inventories struggled with slow loading times and difficult navigation, making it hard for customers to find specific products.
product-catalog.solution: Developed a custom indexing system with Next.js Server Components and dynamic filtering, combined with high-resolution imagery and 360-degree views.
product-catalog.results: Inventory management time reduced by 60%, while conversion rates for deep-catalog items rose by 22%.

fashion-brand.title: Aura: Digital Atelier
fashion-brand.shortDescription: Bridging high-end fashion and generative digital art.
fashion-brand.description: An immersive digital storefront for luxury brands. Every interaction is fluid, mimicking the flow of fabric and light.
fashion-brand.problem: Luxury brands often find digital platforms too rigid, losing the sensory appeal and brand prestige of physical luxury stores.
fashion-brand.solution: Integrated generative Liquid Mesh animations and custom transition shaders to create a sense of 'Digital Silk'.
fashion-brand.results: The collection launch achieved 2M+ organic impressions and sold out within 48 hours.

ordering-app.title: SwiftOrder Pro
ordering-app.shortDescription: Hyper-local delivery application with intelligent logistics.
ordering-app.description: A comprehensive mobile solution for on-demand ordering, featuring AI-driven delivery estimates and seamless payment integrations.
ordering-app.problem: Consumers demand instant gratification, yet many apps suffer from laggy interfaces and inaccurate delivery estimations.
ordering-app.solution: Built a Flutter-based native experience with a custom real-time socket layer for pinpoint accuracy in order tracking.
ordering-app.results: App store rating improved to 4.9 stars, and average order-to-door time decreased by 12%.

driver-app.title: DriveConnect System
driver-app.shortDescription: Real-time driver tracking and booking system.
driver-app.description: A robust platform for managing driver logistics and on-demand bookings.
driver-app.problem: Inefficient driver dispatching led to long wait times and high operational costs.
driver-app.solution: Integrated Google Maps API for optimized routing and real-time fleet visibility.
driver-app.results: Reduced average wait times by 30% and improved driver utilization.

note-app.title: Nexus Notes
note-app.shortDescription: Smart note-taking app with organizational logic.
note-app.description: A sophisticated note-taking tool for professionals and creative thinkers.
note-app.problem: Digital note-taking often becomes cluttered and difficult to navigate.
note-app.solution: Implemented tagging logic and a clean, high-tech interface for mental clarity.
note-app.results: Positive feedback on organizational features and multi-device sync reliability.

ecommerce-platform.title: MarketSphere E-commerce
ecommerce-platform.shortDescription: Scalable e-commerce platform for global trade.
ecommerce-platform.description: A high-conversion e-commerce engine designed for modern retail.
ecommerce-platform.problem: Scaling e-commerce operations often leads to performance bottlenecks.
ecommerce-platform.solution: Architected a serverless frontend with a robust PostgreSQL backend for scale.
ecommerce-platform.results: Zero downtime during peak sales and consistent sub-second page loads.

language-learning.title: LingoPulse App
language-learning.description: An interactive app designed to make language learning addictive and effective.
language-learning.problem: Users often lose motivation in long-term language learning journeys.
language-learning.solution: Incorporated AI-driven gamification and bite-sized learning modules.
language-learning.results: Significant increase in daily active users and course completion rates.
